general.no_permission: You don't have permission to use this command!

welcome.title: 🐾 A new member enters the Hundehütte!
welcome.description:
Welcome {user}, glad you're here!

Check out the rules and grab your roles.

ticket.panel_description:
Do you have a problem or a question?

Click the button to open a ticket.
Our team will get back to you as soon as possible!

> ⚠️ Please only open one ticket per issue.
ticket.created_desc:
Hello {user}!

Please describe your issue in as much detail as possible.
Our team will get back to you as soon as possible!

> 📅 Created: {time}
ticket.closing: This channel will be deleted in **5 seconds**.
ticket.already_open:
You already have an open ticket!
{channel}
ticket.not_a_ticket: This channel is not a ticket!
ticket.error_create: An error occurred while creating the ticket!

roles.title: 🎮 Choose your roles!
roles.description:
Click a button to get a role.
Clicking again will **remove** the role.

**Available Roles:**
{rollen}
roles.not_found:
This role no longer exists.
Please ask an admin to run `/config rollen-remove`.

automod.word_removed: {user}, your message contained a banned word.
automod.link_removed: {user}, sending links is not allowed here.
automod.spam_detected: {user}, please don't send the same message multiple times!

feedback.no_channel:
No feedback channel configured!
Please ask an admin to run `/config feedback-kanal`.
feedback.sent_desc: Your feedback was {anonym}successfully forwarded to the team!

config.welcome_set: Welcome channel has been set to {channel}!
config.feedback_set: Feedback channel has been set to {channel}!
